asset.alt: HubSpot smart CRM campaign dashboard showing automated marketing workflows

copy.heading: Marketing that runs itself. Almost.
copy.subheading: Breeze quietly handles your campaigns, nurture, and attribution — so the busywork runs in the background and you get back to the ideas.

rationale: Single hero as briefed. The product-canvas-panel archetype makes the working surface the pitch: the smart-CRM campaign graphic (024) fills the band as a full-bleed z:back canvas, and a SOLID left-anchored copy panel (panel-on-media, the sanctioned panel-over-media pair) carries the tight claim so type never touches the screenshot — no text-on-media sanction needed. Copy stays warm and wry with the period accent; the eyebrow labels the product, the heading carries the one claim, and the support line advances it with the concrete Breeze specifics (campaigns, nurture, attribution). One primary (Get a demo) beside the secondary (See it in action) honors AS-59. surfaceIntent stays on the page canvas because the panel device renders the inset surface itself; the left anchor names the full-band canvas as counterweight. Disciplined, on-grid, no dark mid-page band, sentence-case sub-weight-500 heading — every neverDo holds.
